examples: A surprising number of ailments are caused by unsuspected environmental factors.
In himself, too, he knew that it was vibrating at last, that chord hitherto dormant and unsuspected.
Earth is a target in a cosmic shooting gallery, subject to random violent events that were unsuspected a few decades ago.
From training and e-learning to simple sales challenges, gaming is adding value in unsuspected areas.
Initial calculations suggest that the previously unsuspected dark energy actually accounts for two-thirds of the substance of the universe.
